overview: Stiflenought is a white-blue tempo shell that leverages efficient card advantage engines to outmaneuver opponents in Legacy. By deploying low-cost threats like Nulldrifter and Phyrexian Dreadnought, the deck generates continuous value while using instant-speed interaction like Daze to dictate the pace of the game. The goal is to stabilize early, maintain board presence, and win through superior resource management.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents through superior card advantage from Nulldrifter and Phyrexian Dreadnought
Deploying efficient threats to apply pressure while holding instant-speed interaction
Stabilizing with Daze to protect key permanents and force unfavorable trades

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two lands and a one-drop threat or interaction
Combinations of Daze and early creatures to establish tempo
Hands that can play a threat on turn one or two
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early interaction or threats
Hands that cannot establish board presence by turn two

early_game: Play lands and deploy one-drops like Nulldrifter to establish board presence and draw cards
Use Daze to counter opponent's early threats or protect your permanents
Prioritize mana efficiency to maintain tempo advantage
mid_game: Transition to Phyrexian Dreadnought to generate card advantage and apply pressure
Hold Daze for key removal or counters to stabilize against aggressive pushes
Use Dreadnought's activated ability to dig for answers while managing life total
late_game: Rely on continuous card advantage from Dreadnought and Nulldrifter recursion to outvalue opponents
Maintain board control with instant-speed interaction to close out games
Manage life total carefully while activating Dreadnought to find game-ending answers

key_cards.name: Phyrexian Dreadnought
key_cards.role: Efficient threat and card advantage engine
key_cards.notes: Deploy on curve to pressure opponents; activate ability selectively to draw cards while monitoring life total to avoid self-damage.

key_cards.name: Daze
key_cards.notes: Use to protect early threats, counter key opponent plays, or force unfavorable trades; prioritize holding up mana for interaction when behind.

key_cards.name: Nulldrifter
key_cards.role: Low-cost flying threat and value generator
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to establish presence; let it die to draw a card and maintain resource parity against aggressive decks.

sequencing_tips: Hold up Daze before committing to a threat to protect against instant-speed removal
Activate Phyrexian Dreadnought only when you have a clear path to recovery or when digging for a specific answer
Prioritize playing Nulldrifter early to trigger its death value and draw into more interaction

matchups.advice: Prioritize Daze on their biggest threats and play Nulldrifter early to draw into answers; use Dreadnought to stabilize.
Race with Dreadnought and Nulldrifter while holding Daze for their key counters or removal; avoid overextending into sweepers.
Use Daze to disrupt their combo pieces and deploy threats quickly to force them to interact; Dreadnought provides value if they go wide.

common_threats: Combo strategies relying on graveyard or mana acceleration
